journal_entry.description: Purchase of building and land for warehouse, 50% paid by cheque plus sales tax, 50% on credit
journal_entry.rationale: The total purchase price is $9,000,000, allocated between land ($6,000,000) and building ($3,000,000) based on relative fair values (8M:4M = 2:1 ratio). Sales tax of 10% applies only to the portion paid ($4,500,000), adding $450,000. Assets acquired: land, building, and recoverable sales tax (HST/GST Recoverable). Cash decreases by $4,950,000, and accounts payable increases by $4,500,000 for the deferred portion.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Building purchase for $9M allocated proportionally to land and building based on fair values. 50% ($4.5M) paid by cheque plus 10% sales tax ($450K), remaining 50% on credit. Three asset increases (land, building, HST recoverable), one asset decrease (cash), one liability increase (payable).
